seo.title: Building RAG Pipeline with Agno + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build rag pipeline with Agno + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building a RAG Pipeline with Agno enables efficient document retrieval, vector search, context assembly, and LLM synthesis for accurate responses with source attribution. Guardrails are essential due to high risks like hallucinations, source unfaithfulness, and irrelevant context in multi-modal agent workflows. Vex provides runtime verification to ensure reliable outputs in production.

architectureOverview.heading: RAG Pipeline Architecture with Agno
architectureOverview.description:
The Agno RAG Pipeline starts with a vector store (e.g., Pinecone or FAISS) indexing document embeddings for semantic search. User queries trigger retrieval of top-k relevant chunks, which are assembled into context and passed to an Agno Agent for synthesis. The agent generates responses with citations, handling multi-modal inputs like images or audio via tools.

Agno's model-agnostic design supports OpenAI, Anthropic, or local models, with session memory for conversation history. Outputs include structured JSON with sources for verification. Common patterns wrap agent.run() in verification layers to catch failures like fabricated citations or context drift.

Verification focuses on source faithfulness (matching retrieved docs), hallucination detection (grounded claims), context relevance (query-doc similarity), and citation accuracy (correct source linking).

risks.name: Source Faithfulness Failure
risks.description: Agent generates claims not grounded in retrieved documents
risks.mitigation: Vex semantic similarity checks between response and sources

risks.name: Hallucination in Synthesis
risks.description: LLM fabricates information despite relevant context
risks.mitigation: Vex hallucination detection with entailment scoring

risks.name: Context Relevance Drift
risks.description: Retrieved documents poorly match query intent

risks.name: Citation Inaccuracy
risks.mitigation: Vex citation validation against retrieved chunk metadata

implementation.title: Setup Agno RAG Agent
implementation.description: Initialize Agno agent with vector store and RAG tools
implementation.code:
from agno.agent import Agent
from agno.tools.rag import RAGTool
from agno.models.openai import OpenAIChat

rag_tool = RAGTool(
    vector_store='pinecone://your-index',
    chunk_size=1000,
    k=5
)

agent = Agent(
    model=OpenAIChat(id='gpt-4o'),
    tools=[rag_tool],
    show_tool_calls=True,
    add_base_tools=False
)

implementation.title: Basic RAG Query Execution
implementation.description: Run agent with query and retrieve response with sources
implementation.code:
query = "What are the key features of Vex?"
result = agent.run(query)
print(result.content)

# Extract citations
sources = [tool_call.args['sources'] for tool_call in result.tool_calls 
           if tool_call.name == 'rag_tool']
print('Sources:', sources)

implementation.title: Structured RAG Output
implementation.description: Enforce JSON schema for response with citations
implementation.code:
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

class RAGResponse(BaseModel):
    answer: str = Field(..., description="Concise answer")
    citations: list[str] = Field(..., description="Source document IDs")

agent = Agent(
    model=OpenAIChat(id='gpt-4o'),
    tools=[rag_tool],
    output_type=RAGResponse,
    add_base_tools=False
)

response = agent.run('Summarize Vex capabilities', output_type=RAGResponse)
print(response.citations)

vexIntegration.title: Wrap agent.run() with vex.verify()
vexIntegration.description: Decorator ensures source faithfulness and hallucination checks

vexIntegration.title: Custom Vex RAG Verifier
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import Verifier, Check

rag_verifier = Verifier(
    checks=[
        Check.SOURCE_FAITHFULNESS(threshold=0.85),
        Check.HALLUCINATION(model='gpt-4o-mini'),
        Check.CONTEXT_RELEVANCE(top_k=3, threshold=0.7),
        Check.CITATION_ACCURACY(exact_match=True)
    ]
)

result = agent.run('Explain RAG architecture')
verified = rag_verifier.verify(
    response=result.content,
    context=result.sources,
    citations=result.citations
)
print('Pass:', verified.passed, 'Score:', verified.score)

cta.heading: Secure Your Agno RAG Pipeline
cta.description: Install Vex today with `pip install vex-sdk` and wrap your agent.run() calls to eliminate RAG failures in production.
